title: Stable Release To Beta Upgrade
objective: Start a disposable OpenClaw env on the stable release track, run the real upgrade path to beta, and verify release upgrade behavior, plugin index migration, bundled runtime deps, and gateway health.

phases.title: Start Stable Release Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable env through the real stable release track before switching to beta.

phases.title: Upgrade To Beta
phases.intent: Run the real OpenClaw upgrade path to the beta release track through OCM.

phases.title: Post-Beta Upgrade Checks
phases.intent: Verify OpenClaw is usable after the beta release upgrade and capture plugin/runtime dependency evidence.
evidence: gateway logs without missing dependency/plugin load failures
